contents: "As the living, dining and cooking spaces were open plan, we wanted to avoid creating a stereotype functional kitchen as the backdrop to the living space," he added. "Instead we aimed to create a more ambiguous cooking area that appeared as a collection of sculptural, art-like objects."“作为客厅，餐厅和厨房的空间是开放的计划，我们希望避免刻板印象功能的厨房为背景的生活空间，”他补充说，“相反，我们的目的是创建一个表现为雕塑，艺术品般的对象的集合一个比较模糊的烹饪区。”
